X.value: Continuous random variable with density f(x) = C * x * e^(-x/2) for x > 0
X.description: The random amount of time (in months) that the system functions, with the given density function f(x) = C * x * e^(-x/2) for x > 0.

threshold.description: The threshold value (5 months) used to compute the probability P(X ≥ 5).
